---
title: "Core Definitions"
---

::: {.callout-warning}
Draft methods page.
:::

Milestone 01 distinguishes symbolic field, symbolic order, and embodied institutional order. It defines political pathology narrowly as maladaptive self-preservation at the expense of truth, correction, personhood, and human flourishing.

See `docs/methodology/core-definitions.md` and `docs/methodology/scoring-codebook.md` for the working codebook.
